characters.name: 沈维桑
characters.appearance: 17岁人族猎户兼旧驿后裔，灰褐猎衣、草药青内层、旧皮护腕、猎弓、短刀、路线包；左肩旧伤必须持续可见。
characters.wardrobe: Grey-brown hunter clothing, herb-green inner layer, old leather wrist guards, bow, short knife and route pack; his injured left shoulder remains visible and limiting.

characters.name: 晏南枝
characters.appearance: 18岁人族旧帝国皇室旁支，黑发红线、冷灰/雾紫流亡外袍、隐藏月白玉片与血牒；逃亡中仍保持挺直礼法姿态。
characters.wardrobe: Human imperial remnant, black hair tied with a red thread, cold grey or mist-purple fugitive robe, hidden moon-white jade and blood record; upright ritual posture even while fleeing.

characters.name: 陆青砾
characters.appearance: 墙下无姓混裔少女，灰蓝短袄、陶土色内层、碎陶护符、黑市通行木牌、腰间窄刀、耳后细鳞痕。
characters.wardrobe: Wall-foot nameless hybrid girl, grey-blue short jacket, clay inner layer, broken pottery charm, black-market wooden pass, narrow knife and faint scales behind the ear.

characters.name: 鹿弥
characters.appearance: 北境鹿族伤者/萨满线索人物，鹿耳短角、骨饰、血盐袋、药草袋、骨笛；伤势与求救状态要清楚。
characters.wardrobe: Northern deer-clan wounded guide, deer ears and short antlers, bone ornaments, blood-salt pouch, herb pouch and bone flute; injury and rescue state must read clearly.

characters.name: 甲军斥候
characters.appearance: 甲军府斥候，冷兵器、军府封锁姿态、边墙战区追击纪律清楚。
characters.wardrobe: Military office scouts with cold weapons, blockade posture and disciplined frontier pursuit.

characters.name: 北境掠粮派
characters.appearance: 北境南压队伍，不能画成无脑兽潮；要有人与共生兽、冻伤、迁徙与求生痕迹。
characters.wardrobe: Northern pressure group, not a mindless beast horde; show people, symbiotic beasts, frost injuries, migration and survival traces.

locations.name: 鸣骨岭
locations.spatial_layout: 半埋骨骸、风蚀骨孔、雪坑、冰蓝火、骨笛和北境迁徙痕迹。

locations.name: 骨笛谷口
locations.spatial_layout: 谷口夹击空间，甲军斥候与北境掠粮派同时逼近。

locations.name: 边墙外废烽燧
locations.spatial_layout: 暮色废烽燧、盟书印记、冻裂旧兵器和北境旧誓线索。

props.name: 月白玉片
props.description: 晏南枝隐藏身份的月白玉片，火光或旧驿反应中显出日月纹。
props.description_en: moon-white jade piece that exposes Yan Nanzhi's identity when firelight or relay-stone reaction reveals sun-moon markings

props.name: 骨笛
props.description: 鹿弥和北境求救/停兽逻辑的核心道具。
props.description_en: bone flute used by Lu Mi and northern rescue or beast-calming logic

props.name: 清明白册
props.description: 清明院用于验名、追踪、错册和抹名的白册。
props.description_en: Qingming white register used for name testing, tracking, false entries and erasure

props.name: 日月血牒
props.description: 油纸包裹的残缺血牒，不可展开成万能圣物；它会引发追踪风险。
props.description_en: oil-paper wrapped damaged blood record; not a magic solution, and it carries tracking risk

props.name: 半枚日月驿令
props.description: 半枚日月驿令，只能触发断续旧驿残纹，不能完整开路或替代判断。
props.description_en: half sun-moon relay token that only triggers broken old-route lines and cannot replace judgment

props.name: 血盐袋
props.description: 鹿弥与北境迁徙/求救线索道具。
props.description_en: blood-salt pouch tied to Lu Mi and northern migration/rescue clues

continuity_rules: 沈维桑左肩旧伤、猎户动作和有限旧驿共鸣必须按剧本代价呈现，不能升级成无代价法术。
晏南枝血牒和月白玉片只在剧本指定压力中暴露，逃亡装保持遮蔽但不削弱气度。
肃明层级必须区分白册官吏、奴兵、虫族小兵、白翳/甲军府，不混成同一种敌人。
金赤只属于旧驿、日月纹、盟书和残页；虫蜡白/骨白属于清明院制度空间；边墙雪线保持黑石、冰青、旧铁和干血暗红。
所有动作按真实重心和真实接触反作用生成，避免摆拍、漂浮慢动作和无因果奇观。
